name_en: Horní Rokytnice nad Jizerou mountain resort area

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay at the mountain hut?
phrases.text_local: Jak se platí na horské chatě?
phrases.cultural_note: Smaller mountain huts often prefer cash, especially for table service, while the bar might have a terminal.

likely_response.local: Hotově u stolu, kartu bereme jen na baru.
likely_response.translation_en: Cash at the table, we only take cards at the bar.

responses.english: Cash at the table, we only take cards at the bar.
responses.local: Hotově u stolu, kartu bereme jen na baru.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Harrachov parking payment?
phrases.text_local: Kde se platí parkovné v Harrachově?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking in Czech mountain resorts is typically paid at a central automated machine before exiting or upon arrival.

likely_response.local: Automatu u hlavního vjezdu na parkoviště.
likely_response.translation_en: At the machine by the main parking lot entrance.

responses.english: At the machine by the main parking lot entrance.
responses.local: Automatu u hlavního vjezdu na parkoviště.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I get a trail map?
phrases.cultural_note: Local information centers ('infocentrum') are the standard place for detailed trail maps in Czech towns.

likely_response.local: V infocentru u kostela, hned na náměstíčku.
likely_response.translation_en: At the info center by the church, right on the square.

responses.english: At the info center by the church, right on the square.
responses.local: V infocentru u kostela, hned na náměstíčku.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy a Lysá hora ski pass?
phrases.text_local: Kde si koupím skipas na Lysou horu?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech ski areas often have separate windows for passes and tickets; 'vlevo' (to the left) is a common directional cue.

likely_response.local: U dolní stanice lanovky, vlevo od pokladny.
likely_response.translation_en: At the bottom station of the lift, left of the ticket office.

responses.english: At the bottom station of the lift, left of the ticket office.
responses.local: U dolní stanice lanovky, vlevo od pokladny.

phrases.intent_en: Is there accommodation in Dolní Rokytnice?
phrases.cultural_note: 'Pension' is the common term for family-run guesthouses in Czech mountain villages, often clustered along main roads.

likely_response.local: Ano, pár penzionů je u hlavní silnice.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are a few pensions along the main road.

responses.english: Yes, there are a few pensions along the main road.
responses.local: Ano, pár penzionů je u hlavní silnice.
